+# Check eval_config.json

+for path in ['/data/eval_config.json', '/data/maps_eval/eval_config.json']:

+    if os.path.exists(path):

+# Check maps_eval directory

+if os.path.exists('/data/maps_eval'):

+    print('\nFiles in /data/maps_eval:')

+    for f in sorted(os.listdir('/data/maps_eval')):

+        print(f'  {f}')
